scripts.prepare: node -e "const { existsSync } = require('node:fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const huskyBin = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'node_modules\\.bin\\husky.cmd' : 'node_modules/.bin/husky'; if (!existsSync(huskyBin)) process.exit(0); const result = spawnSync(huskyBin, { stdio: 'inherit', shell: false }); process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build:web && npm run check:worker
